## What does this PR do?

<!-- One-sentence summary. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Content: new or updated lesson/quiz/source
- [ ] Code: site functionality, components, styles
- [ ] Docs: project documentation
- [ ] CI: build, deploy, or validation changes

## For content PRs

- [ ] All factual claims cite a source from `sources.json`
- [ ] `reviewStatus` is set to `draft` (not `published` or `reviewed`)
- [ ] Topic frontmatter matches the schema in [Content Model](../docs/content-model.md)
- [ ] Quiz questions have exactly 4 choices and a valid `answerIndex`
- [ ] Question IDs are globally unique
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes

## For code PRs

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (TypeScript)
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (content integrity)
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
